name: StarterKit
author: note3crafter
readme_markdown: # StarterKit for Pocketmine API 5.0.0 A StarterKit plugin where you can insert your starter items in the Config that a new player can get In the Config you can easily change the items yourself # Config Welcome to StarterKit 4.0.1 by TheNote You Can now setup more Features! * - slot: <- Set the Slot wo are the Item Place (0-35) * name: <- set the ItemName here * count: <- set the amount of the Item * name: <- set a Customname for the Item * lore: <- set the Lore of the Item # Other have fun with the plugin and make a issue for Proplems on GitHub Plugin mate by TheNote [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/427472879072968714.svg?style=flat-square&label=discord&colorB=7289da)](https://discord.gg/ju2gGzq) |
